subscription.change.title: Change plan
subscription.change.no_card: No card entry required — your saved payment method is used automatically.
subscription.change.immediate: Immediate change — new features are available as soon as confirmed.
subscription.change.proration: Prorated billing — you only pay for the remaining days of the current month at the new rate.
subscription.change.cancel: Cancel anytime — no commitment, you keep access until the end of the current period.
subscription.change.confirm_msg: By confirming, your saved card will be charged for the remaining days this month. The change is immediate with no service interruption.

tour.onboarding.name: Getting started
tour.onboarding.description: Discover the interface and main features of Frimousse.
tour.add-nanny.name: Create a nanny
tour.add-nanny.description: Learn how to add a childcare professional to your team.
tour.add-parent.name: Create a parent
tour.add-parent.description: Learn how to register a parent or legal guardian in the app.
tour.add-child.name: Register a child
tour.add-child.description: Learn how to register a child and link them to a parent and nanny.
tour.planning.name: Manage the schedule
tour.planning.description: Discover how to organize the schedule and attendance tracking.
tour.presence-sheets.name: Attendance sheets
tour.presence-sheets.description: Create and sign monthly attendance records with parents.
tour.messaging.name: Instant messaging
tour.messaging.description: Chat in real time with nannies and parents at your center.
tour.feed-reports.name: News feed
tour.feed-reports.description: Communicate with parents: mood, meals, incidents, daily moments.
settings.tutorials.title: Interactive tutorials
settings.tutorials.menu.title: Tutorials
settings.tutorials.menu.subtitle: Learn how to use Frimousse
settings.tutorials.menu.footer: You can restart a tutorial at any time from the ? button in the menu.
supportpage.community.title: Community
supportpage.community.description: Connect with other users and share best practices.
tour.onboarding.step0.title: Welcome to Frimousse!
tour.onboarding.step0.content: This tutorial will walk you through each page of the app one by one. You will know what every section does in under 2 minutes.
tour.onboarding.step1.title: Your organisation
tour.onboarding.step1.content: Your organisation name is displayed here at the top of the menu. Every page is accessible from this sidebar.
tour.onboarding.step2.title: Dashboard
tour.onboarding.step3.title: Activity feed
tour.onboarding.step4.title: Notifications
tour.onboarding.step4.content: Notifications alert you to new messages, posts, or important events. The badge shows the number of unread notifications.
tour.onboarding.step5.title: Children
tour.onboarding.step5.content: The list of all children enrolled in your organisation. You can add a child, view their info, allergies, group, and link them to their parents.
tour.onboarding.step6.title: Parents
tour.onboarding.step7.title: Nannies
tour.onboarding.step8.title: Activities
tour.onboarding.step9.title: Reports
tour.onboarding.step10.title: AI Assistant
tour.onboarding.step11.title: Attendance sheets
tour.onboarding.step12.title: Messages
tour.onboarding.step13.title: Payments
tour.onboarding.step14.title: My subscription
tour.onboarding.step15.title: Settings
tour.add-nanny.step0.title: Add a nanny
tour.add-nanny.step0.content: Follow this guide to add a new professional (childminder, assistant...) to your team.
tour.add-nanny.step1.title: Nannies menu
tour.add-nanny.step1.content: Start by clicking "Nannies" in the menu to access your team list.
tour.add-nanny.step2.title: Add button
tour.add-nanny.step2.content: Click this button to open the form for adding a new nanny.
tour.add-nanny.step3.title: Fill in the form
tour.add-nanny.step3.content: Enter the name, email, password, and contact details. The email and password will let the nanny log in to their space.
tour.add-nanny.step4.title: Availability & specialisations
tour.add-nanny.step4.content: Set availability (available or on leave), years of experience, and any specialisations.
tour.add-nanny.step5.title: Nanny created!
tour.add-nanny.step5.content: Once confirmed, the nanny appears in the list and can log in with their credentials. You can then assign children to them in the schedule.
tour.add-parent.step0.title: Add a parent
tour.add-parent.step0.content: This tutorial shows you how to create a parent account. The parent can then log in to follow their child.
tour.add-parent.step1.title: Parents menu
tour.add-parent.step1.content: Click "Parents" in the sidebar menu to access parent management.
tour.add-parent.step2.title: Add button
tour.add-parent.step2.content: Click here to open the form for creating a new parent.
tour.add-parent.step3.title: Parent information
tour.add-parent.step3.content: Enter the first name, last name, email, and phone number. The email will serve as the login identifier.
tour.add-parent.step4.title: Address & password
tour.add-parent.step5.title: Parent created!
tour.add-parent.step5.content: The parent is now registered! You can then link one or more children to them when creating a child.
tour.add-child.step0.title: Enrol a child
tour.add-child.step0.content: This guide explains how to add a child to Frimousse and link them to their parents and nanny.
tour.add-child.step1.title: Children menu
tour.add-child.step1.content: Go to the "Children" section from the menu.
tour.add-child.step2.title: Add button
tour.add-child.step2.content: Click the add button to open the enrolment form.
tour.add-child.step3.content: Enter the name, date of birth, gender, and group (babies, toddlers, older...). The group helps organise children by age.
tour.add-child.step4.title: Link a parent
tour.add-child.step4.content: Select the parent from the dropdown. If the parent has not been created yet, do so first via the "Add a parent" tutorial.
tour.add-child.step5.title: Medical information
tour.add-child.step5.content: Add any allergies and important health information. This information will be visible to the nannies.
tour.add-child.step6.title: Child enrolled!
tour.add-child.step6.content: The child now appears in the list. You can assign a nanny to them via the schedule and their parents can follow their activity.
tour.planning.step0.title: The schedule
tour.planning.step0.content: The schedule lets you view nanny-child assignments and manage daily attendance tracking.
tour.planning.step1.title: Dashboard
tour.planning.step1.content: The dashboard shows the monthly calendar with planned assignments for each day.
tour.planning.step2.title: Create an assignment
tour.planning.step2.content: Click on a day in the calendar to create an assignment: choose the child and the nanny, then confirm.
tour.planning.step3.title: Activities
tour.planning.step3.content: In the Activities section, plan weekly activities: music, motor skills, arts and crafts...
tour.presence-sheets.step0.title: Attendance sheets
tour.presence-sheets.step1.title: Access sheets
tour.presence-sheets.step1.content: Click "Attendance sheets" in the menu to access this section.
tour.presence-sheets.step2.title: Create a sheet
tour.presence-sheets.step2.content: Click "New sheet", select the child, month, and year. Default arrival and departure times are pre-filled to save you time.
tour.presence-sheets.step3.title: Enter times
tour.presence-sheets.step3.content: For each working day, adjust the arrival and departure times if needed. Check "Absent" if the child was not present. Weekends and public holidays are automatically disabled.
tour.presence-sheets.step4.title: Send to parent
tour.presence-sheets.step4.content: Once times are entered, click "Send to parents". The parent receives a notification and can access the sheet from their space.
tour.presence-sheets.step5.title: Digital signature
tour.presence-sheets.step5.content: Each day can be signed independently. The nanny signs on their side, the parent signs on theirs. Signatures appear in real time thanks to instant synchronisation.
tour.presence-sheets.step6.title: Signature security
tour.presence-sheets.step6.content: Once a day has been signed, the times can no longer be modified by the nanny or parent. Only an administrator can correct an already-signed entry.
tour.presence-sheets.step7.title: PDF export
tour.presence-sheets.step7.content: You can export the sheet to PDF at any time to archive or print it. It includes all monthly attendance records and signatures.
tour.messaging.step0.title: Instant messaging
tour.messaging.step0.content: Messaging lets you communicate in real time with everyone in your centre: nannies and parents. Messages are delivered instantly via WebSockets.
tour.messaging.step1.title: Access messages
tour.messaging.step1.content: Click "Messages" in the menu to open messaging.
tour.messaging.step2.title: Conversation list
tour.messaging.step3.title: Online status
tour.messaging.step3.content: A green dot next to the avatar means the person is currently connected. A grey dot means they are offline.
tour.messaging.step4.title: New conversation
tour.messaging.step5.title: Send a message
tour.messaging.step5.content: Type your message in the input area and press Enter to send. Use Shift+Enter for a new line. The recipient receives a push notification even if they do not have the app open.
tour.messaging.step6.title: Typing indicator
tour.messaging.step6.content: When your contact is typing, three animated dots appear in the conversation. The same experience as modern messaging apps.
tour.messaging.step7.title: Edit or delete a message
tour.messaging.step7.content: Long-press one of your bubbles to reveal a context menu. You can edit the text or delete the message. Edits are visible in real time to your contact.
tour.messaging.step8.title: Delete a conversation
tour.messaging.step8.content: On mobile, swipe a conversation to the left to reveal the red delete button. The conversation is removed from your list instantly.
tour.feed-reports.step0.title: Activity feed
tour.feed-reports.step1.title: Access the feed
tour.feed-reports.step1.content: Click "Activity feed" in the menu to access posts.
tour.feed-reports.step2.title: Share moments
tour.feed-reports.step3.title: Reactions & responses
tour.feed-reports.step3.content: Parents can like posts and see who else has reacted. This builds trust and transparency between the organisation and families.
tour.feed-reports.step4.title: Best practice
feed.identify_warning_full: Please identify the children or check "No child" before saving the images.
feed.delete_post.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this post?
